description:
4x4-remember-

CHINESE RULES

All of YOUR stones on the board count as 1 point for you when scoring(exept dead stones)

Surrounded spaces that are not surrounded by diagonals in seki count as 1 land.

Captured stones don't count as 1 point-------


WARNING

seriosly simple problem

Do not flag bad problem------I already had this analysed- I just cant resize the board to make it 4x4

Passing at the end of the game is auto matic and scoring is also automatic---

And there is 1.5 KOMI

Don't be afraid,it's so easy that a 10k made the entire thing and figured the soulution on his own------

For some reason i cant get it to 'capture' properley-removing the dead stone.

Have fun!!!!

Sorry i can't find your comments so email me limfc1216@yahoo.com.hk
